text: this is realme buds T500 pro it comes with LHDC and Hi-Res audio wireless support case made in India, 50db noise cancellation 12.4mm audio drivers, battery life 56 hours of course with charging case and it has a 3 mic system lets unbox it this is how the product looks actually very interesting this is the charging case and the material used is leathery type it gives an amazing premium unique look it has Hi-Res audio LHDC type C port you have to charge the charging case and here is the strap option the earbuds are like this they come with touch sensitive buttons it has metallic finish yellow and golden color combination you have to use the charging case like this it has LED notification which gives you an idea of the status of the charging case the strap is also yellow and it blends well with the charging case you can attach the strap here this is the booklet and some extra earplugs you have to use realme link application I have connected the earbuds it has noise cancellation option the sound quality is very good it has an off option and transparency mode which gives you a better background sound it has a mind flow option which is a specific sound this is AI translate you can use this face to face translator you will get data here and you can hear the voice through the earphones it has live translator option you can see the battery level information, enhance voice option it reduces wind noise it has equalizer mode it has dynamic audio option it has game mode it has triple device connection you can connect 3 devices with it the fit of the earbuds is good they are comfortable they will not fall off your ears I will rate it 4.5 out of 5 do let me know in the comments below
